canonical_definition: A cryptographic evaluation framework that applies bijective and non-bijective token-level substitution ciphers to in-context learning inputs to assess task learning by comparing performance gaps between reversible and irreversible mappings.
papers: Enhanced Noun-Noun Compound Interpretation through Textual Enrichment
